description_long: This object is a single, elongated banana with a slightly curved shape and a smooth, matte peel. The peel is predominantly yellow with subtle green tinges near the stem and some brownish discoloration at the tip and along the body, indicating minor bruising. The banana's surface appears intact, with no visible tears or splits, and the stem is short and slightly dried. The body of the banana is plump and tapers gently toward both ends, with a rounded base and a pointed tip. The overall texture of the peel is semi-soft, with a faintly waxy appearance and a few minor surface blemishes. No commercial stickers or labels are visible on the peel.
description: A slightly curved, yellow banana with a smooth, matte peel and minor brownish blemishes. The peel is intact, with green at the stem and no visible stickers.
description_view_0: Front view shows the banana standing upright, highlighting the rounded base and the greenish stem at the top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the banana's gentle curvature and elongated body, with some brownish spots visible along the peel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tapered end and the subtle green and brown hues at the base, with the peel appearing smooth and unbroken.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the banana's full length and curvature, with the tip and stem both visible.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana's peel is smooth and mostly intact, with minor brownish blemishes and no visible tears or splits. The surface shows slight bruising but maintains good structural integrity.
